description: A Department of Labor poster. It is a high-contrast black-and-white photograph of President Donald Trump giving a military-style hand salute, his face turned slightly upward. He wears a dark zip jacket bearing the embroidered circular 'SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES' emblem on the left chest, over a shirt and tie. Behind him, out of focus, are an aircraft (Air Force One or a jet) and stadium-style signage with large numerals. A large bold all-caps white serif headline across the top reads 'AMERICA FIRST'.
notable_text: AMERICA FIRST | SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES (jacket emblem)
